topic: SignalR Hubs trong .NET 8: Real-time bi-directional với WebSocket
summary: SignalR Hub cung cấp real-time bi-directional communication: server push tới client, client gọi server method. Groups cho broadcast tới subset (user, tenant). Horizontal scaling cần Redis backplane.
problem: Polling API cho real-time updates: tốn bandwidth, latency cao. Server-Sent Events chỉ server-to-client. WebSocket raw cần protocol tự viết.
solution: SignalR Hub: strongly-typed, Groups, scale-out với Redis backplane. Client SDK cho JS, .NET, Java, Swift.
tradeoffs: Redis backplane cho SignalR: 2–5ms latency per message, chi phí Redis connection từ mỗi instance
SignalR không phải cho high-frequency data (>100 msgs/sec per connection): dùng WebSocket raw
Long-running connections consume server resources: estimate connections × memory per connection
Load balancer phải support sticky sessions hoặc WebSocket protocol upgrade

selfVerification.method: Integration test: connect client, verify server push received
